title: 駆け抜けろ、お弁当作り！

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And the finishing touch is to put in your
favorites... Okay, done.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Carrot Ranger sausages and Carrot
Ranger hamburger steaks!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It's jam-packed with foods I love! I can't wait to
dig in!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, tomorrow's picnic is going to be so
exciting. All that's left is Akebono's...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That's the twelfth layer complete. ...It
looks like this is still going to take a while longer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Flower and Biko, you should both turn in for the
night! I'll go to bed when I'm done with my
twenty-layer Buono Sumo Stew lunchbox!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
A true hero never abandons her friends! And
remember—we're sprinters! Our combined speed
should make short work of this lunchbox!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If we divide up the tasks, we'll be
able to finish quickly enough that it won't affect
our schedule!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Thank you both!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Akebono, you just focus on cooking. And don't
worry about how big things get.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can adjust the portions by arranging the food,
and I'll divide up anything that doesn't fit into the
boxes!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's cook up some buono food!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Biko, please pass Akebono the ingredients she
asks for while making sure the extra portions I set
aside find their way into the fridge!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I'll move as quickly as Carrot
Ranger Turbo in Speed Mode!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here we go! Pound some meat! Crack the
pepper! Shake-shake-shake the salt! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Stuff it into the boxes, wrap up the extras
aaand... Here, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Carrot Boost full power! Yah, yah, yah, yah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the picnic arrives...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about time for lunch! I'm starving after
all that walking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to you two, I completed the upgraded
thirty-layer buono chanko lunchbox! Go ahead
and eat your fill! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Here's your specially requested Carrot
Ranger lunchbox, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Excellent! It's chow time! One, two...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Dig iiiin! ♪
